title: InstinctLearning Input
description: Validated inputs for instinct-learning skill execution

action.description: The operation to perform on instincts

text.description: Atomic behavior description (required for record). Imperative mood, one behavior only.

confidence.description: Confidence score for the instinct. 0.8+ triggers auto-promotion to global scope.

source.description: Context describing the observation that generated this instinct

id.description: Instinct ID for update action (format: inst-xxxxxxxx)

scope.description: Filter by scope for query/list actions

minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold for query results

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return
